violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and mixing bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The gasket on the larger food prep unit was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: floor mixer can opener base prep units, especially beneath the lids and around hardware New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The adjacent area behind a storage trailer has an accumulation of unused items, trash, and litter. The area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
Cobwebs observed above the clean towel storage area in basement. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Two lights beneath the hood were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2024
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair, with numerous cracked tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on a shelf in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
